creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to nightquick from comment #5)
Yes, it is most likely abandoned.

Being a maintainer requires some ground knowledge.
How about you prepare a patch with some improvements for the port and see how it goes?

You can start by having a look at this: https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/

Cheers.
